Business Structuring & Business Advisory

Solid structures to grow and protect.

An advisory firm built like a family office.

Speak with us

Built For
Ambitious Business Owners · HNW Investors · Family Offices
Melbourne · Headquarters
— What we do

Five disciplines,
one architecture.

Every structure we design serves the same client across their whole picture — so the entity that owns the business also protects the family, scales across borders, and survives the next generation.

01 / 05

Business Advisory

Counsel before architecture. We sit alongside founders, boards and private owners on the strategic decisions that shape the business — capital, growth, partnerships, governance and risk — so every structural move we make later is in service of a clear commercial direction.

  • Strategic counsel for founders & boards
  • Capital strategy & debt/equity advisory
  • Governance, risk & decision frameworks
  • Growth, partnership & commercial structuring
Discover business advisory
02 / 05

Business Structuring

The right entity, the right ownership, the right asset perimeter. We design and implement company, trust and hybrid structures that protect what you've built, optimise tax position, and prepare the business for capital, partners or sale.

  • Company, trust & hybrid structuring
  • Asset protection & risk perimeter
  • Founder & shareholder agreements
  • Restructure for capital, sale or succession
Discover business structuring
03 / 05

International Business Structuring

Cross-border by design. We architect international business structures across reputable jurisdictions — coordinating local counsel, tax advisers and substance requirements — so your group operates globally without losing legal, tax or operational integrity.

  • Holding & IP-licensing structures
  • Multi-jurisdiction tax & treaty alignment
  • Substance, governance & reporting
  • Inbound & outbound investment vehicles
Discover international business structuring
04 / 05

Family Office Structuring

Wealth that crosses borders, generations and asset classes deserves an architecture of its own. We design and run international family office structures — holding, investment, trust and succession vehicles — that protect private capital and keep it coordinated across jurisdictions.

  • International holding & investment vehicles
  • Trust, foundation & private fund structures
  • Succession & intergenerational governance
  • Residency, citizenship & tax-residence alignment
Discover family office structuring
05 / 05

Business Exit Strategy

The structure you sell from is rarely the structure you built in. Years before a transaction, we re-architect the business so the eventual sale is clean, defensible and tax-efficient — protecting sale proceeds, preserving optionality, and removing the surprises buyers and advisers find in diligence.

  • Pre-transaction restructure & entity clean-up
  • Capital gains & rollover positioning
  • Earn-out, vendor finance & sale-proceeds protection
  • Diligence readiness & deal-room architecture
Discover business exit strategy
“
A good structure is invisible when it works, and decisive when it matters. Ours are built to do both — quietly, for decades.
Structure Me · Founding principle
— By the numbers

An architecture that compounds.

15+

Jurisdictions across which we have designed and implemented client structures.

400+
structures

Australian and international corporate structures designed, implemented and maintained for our clients.

$2B+

Aggregate enterprise value held within structures we have architected for founders, families and investor groups.

Designed, not assembled
— Our approach

Architecture, before activity.

I.

Structure precedes strategy

Most groups grow into the wrong shape. We start with the end state — succession, sale, expansion, protection — and work back to the entity, the ownership and the agreements that make it possible.

II.

Designed for the world, not one map

Our clients live, hold assets and earn across borders. We design structures that respect each jurisdiction's substance, tax and reporting demands — and coordinate the local counsel who keep them compliant.

III.

Discreet by default

Private wealth and private business stay private for a reason. Our work is carried out quietly, our clients are introduced selectively, and our network of jurisdictional partners is kept off the public record — by design, and by request.

IV.

Implemented, not just advised

Plans on paper protect no one. We sit with the lawyers, tax advisers and registries until the structure is filed, the agreements are signed and the architecture is live — end-to-end, in writing.

— Begin

Most of our work begins with a quiet conversation.

Whether you are restructuring a business, going international, or building a structure to last beyond you — start with a confidential introduction.

Request an introduction
